title: Nix's Reignited Blazes
body:
# Requires Optifine or EMF+ETF to work!

# About.

Ever since Mojang announced the Breeze there's been a couple of takes on modernizing the Blaze to the same standard by the community. This pack is my take on such! Pretty simple.

This pack was made for 1.20.1, originally for my modpack but it should work in any other version.

## Additional Stuff.

I also added a blue soul fire colored Soul Sand Valley variant for the Blaze!

Additional support for the mod [Friends&Foes](https://modrinth.com/mod/friends-and-foes-forge) with a retextured Wildfire for color palette consistency and a minor texture edit to it's head and crown to give it eyebrows like the Blaze.


thats about it, have fun! feel free to use in your own projects w/credit! (and preferably asking me as well beforehand)

You can find me on Discord (myrusen) and Twitter (@stellers1145)!
